# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    ansiColor('xterm')
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
  }

  parameters {
    choice(
      name: 'SHELL',
      choices: ['bash', 'sh', 'zsh'],
      description: 'Shell to use for executing provided commands.'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'DRY_RUN',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'If true, prints commands without executing.'
    )

    choice(
      name: 'FAIL_ON_EMPTY',
      choices: ['true', 'false'],
      description: 'If true, empty command blocks are treated as an error.'
    )

    choice(
      name: 'COMMAND_MODE',
      choices: ['single', 'multi'],
      description: 'single = execute each command as a script block; multi = split into lines and run each non-empty line.'
    )

    text(
      name: 'ENV_VARS',
      defaultValue: '',
      description: 'Optional environment variables (one per line) in KEY=VALUE form. Lines starting with # are ignored.'
    )

    text(
      name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS',
      defaultValue: '',
      description: 'Build step commands. Provide shell script (single mode) or one command per line (multi mode).'
    )

    text(
      name: 'TEST_COMMANDS',
      defaultValue: '',
      description: 'Test step commands. Provide shell script (single mode) or one command per line (multi mode).'
    )

    text(
      name: 'DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
      defaultValue: '',
      description: 'Deploy step commands. Provide shell script (single mode) or one command per line (multi mode).'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'SKIP_BUILD',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'Skip build stage.'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'SKIP_TEST',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'Skip test stage.'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'SKIP_DEPLOY',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'Skip deploy stage.'
    )
  }

  environment {
    SELECTED_SHELL = "${params.SHELL}"
  }

  stages {
    stage('Prepare') {
      steps {
        script {
          def parseEnvVars = { String raw ->
            def envs = []
            if (!raw) return envs
            raw.split(/\r?\n/).each { line ->
              def l = (line ?: '').trim()
              if (!l) return
              if (l.startsWith('#')) return
              if (!l.contains('=')) {
                error("Invalid ENV_VARS entry (expected KEY=VALUE): '${l}'")
              }
              def key = l.substring(0, l.indexOf('=')).trim()
              if (!key) error("Invalid ENV_VARS entry with empty key: '${l}'")
              envs << l
            }
            return envs
          }

          def normBool = { v ->
            if (v == null) return false
            def s = v.toString().trim().toLowerCase()
            return (s == 'true' || s == '1' || s == 'yes' || s == 'y')
          }

          currentBuild.description = [
            "SHELL=${params.SHELL}",
            "DRY_RUN=${params.DRY_RUN}",
            "MODE=${params.COMMAND_MODE}",
            "SKIP_BUILD=${params.SKIP_BUILD}",
            "SKIP_TEST=${params.SKIP_TEST}",
            "SKIP_DEPLOY=${params.SKIP_DEPLOY}"
          ].join(' | ')

          env._PIPE_ENV_LIST = groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(parseEnvVars(params.ENV_VARS ?: ''))
          env._FAIL_ON_EMPTY = normBool(params.FAIL_ON_EMPTY).toString()
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      when { expression { return !params.SKIP_BUILD } }
      steps {
        script {
          runUserCommands('BUILD_COMMANDS', params.BUILD_COMMANDS ?: '')
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Test') {
      when { expression { return !params.SKIP_TEST } }
      steps {
        script {
          runUserCommands('TEST_COMMANDS', params.TEST_COMMANDS ?: '')
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy') {
      when { expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY } }
      steps {
        script {
          runUserCommands('DEPLOY_COMMANDS', params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS ?: '')
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      echo "Build finished with status: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
    }
  }
}

def runUserCommands(String label, String raw) {
  def failOnEmpty = (env._FAIL_ON_EMPTY ?: 'false').toBoolean()
  def mode = (params.COMMAND_MODE ?: 'single').toString()
  def dryRun = (params.DRY_RUN ?: false) as boolean
  def shellName = (params.SHELL ?: 'bash').toString()

  def envList = []
  try {
    envList = new groovy.json.JsonSlurperClassic().parseText(env._PIPE_ENV_LIST ?: '[]') as List
  } catch (ignored) {
    envList = []
  }

  def isEmpty = { String s -> (s == null || s.trim().isEmpty()) }

  if (isEmpty(raw)) {
    if (failOnEmpty) {
      error("${label} is empty and FAIL_ON_EMPTY=true")
    }
    echo("${label}: no commands provided; skipping.")
    return
  }

  def runBlock = { String block ->
    if (dryRun) {
      echo("DRY_RUN=true; would execute (${label}):\n${block}")
      return
    }
    if (shellName == 'bash') {
      sh(label: label, script: block, shell: '/bin/bash')
    } else if (shellName == 'zsh') {
      sh(label: label, script: block, shell: '/bin/zsh')
    } else {
      sh(label: label, script: block)
    }
  }

  def executeInEnv = { Closure body ->
    if (envList && envList.size() > 0) {
      withEnv(envList) { body() }
    } else {
      body()
    }
  }

  executeInEnv {
    if (mode == 'multi') {
      def lines = raw.split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it && !it.startsWith('#') }
      if (!lines || lines.isEmpty()) {
        if (failOnEmpty) error("${label} contains no runnable commands after filtering comments/blank lines.")
        echo("${label}: no runnable commands after filtering; skipping.")
        return
      }
      lines.eachWithIndex { cmd, i ->
        def block = """\
set -euo pipefail
${cmd}
""".stripIndent()
        runBlock("${block}")
      }
    } else {
      def block = """\
set -euo pipefail
${raw}
""".stripIndent()
      runBlock(block)
    }
  }
}
